{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20763_1
|class_id=20763
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=collection@20763_2
|fame=16
|art=16
|fth=29
|civ=15
|tech=14
|ss1=Snail Leadership +2<br>Per 20 Lucky Star gained, Snail HP +10<br>Lucky Star Gained: 4500/4500
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>Per 20 Lucky Star gained, Snail HP +20<br>Lucky Star Gained: 4500/4500
|ss3=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 20 Lucky Star gained, Snail HP +30<br>Lucky Star Gained: 4500/4500
|ss4=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 20 Lucky Star gained, Snail HP +30<br>Lucky Star Gained: 4500/4500
|ss7=Snail Leadership +6<br>Per 20 Lucky Star gained, Snail HP +30<br>Lucky Star Gained: 4500/4500<br> (Awakened)
}}
